metadata.description: Autonomous idea-generating agents with distinct personalities that explore your project and produce creative design documents.

plugins.name: gremlins
plugins.description: Run a team of AI agents with distinct creative personalities against your project: each pitches a wild idea, they cross-critique, then produce full design documents. Five-phase orchestrated workflow (survey, pitch, critique, deep-dive, design, deliver) with local, PR, or GitHub-issue output modes.
